name: @gana-v8/ai-runtime
description: Reusable HTTP AI runtime with provider registry, model selection, streaming, and structured output.

scripts.test: pnpm run build && tsx --test tests/**/*.test.ts && node ../../scripts/workspace-test.mjs .
scripts.clean: node --eval "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => fs.rm('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
